title: USB Desk Fan with LED Display & 5400mAh Battery, 5-Speed Adjustable, 90° Tilt Hangable Quiet Portable Table Fan for Bedroom, Office, Dorm, Kitchen, Wall, Home
features: 🧊Precision Speed Control & TurboBoost Airflow: Experience dual customization with 5 preset speeds (1%/25%/50%/75%/100%) for quick adjustments and seamless stepless speed selection through arrow-hold functionality. The proprietary 7-blade TurboBoost system delivers 39% stronger airflow than standard 3-blade fans, delivering office-strength airflow while maintaining library-quiet operation for focused workspaces.

🧊Built-in 5400mAh Battery with LED Display: Equipped with a high-capacity 5400mAh rechargeable battery, this small desk fan provides long-lasting cooling. The digital LED display shows both the current speed setting and remaining battery level, so you always know when to recharge.

🧊90°Adjustable Tilt & Versatile Mounting Options: This deskstop fan head can be manually tilted by 90 degrees, allowing you to direct airflow precisely where you need it. With a built-in hook and a small screw provided, you can easily hang it on a wall or mount it on smooth surface for flexible placement.

🧊Quiet Operation & USB Rechargeable: Designed with a noise-reducing motor, this room bedside fan operates quietly, making it perfect for use in quiet environments like offices or bedrooms. It comes with a USB-C cable, allowing you to charge it with laptops, power banks, or wall adapters for convenient use anywhere.

🧊Compact & Portable Design: With its lightweight and space-saving design, this portable personal table fan is perfect for desks, nightstands, bedsides, or countertops. Its compact size makes it easy to move and use anywhere—ideal for use as a bedroom fan, office fan, desk fan, kitchen fan, or dorm fan.
description: Product Description Cool Your Summer with Refluxe LED Display Desk Fan Advanced Air Circulation Technology 7-blade turbocharged design moves 39% more air than traditional 3-blade fans. Features 90° upward tilt mechanism for whole-room circulation - cools spaces 2X faster than conventional desk fans. Digital LED Display for Enhanced Control: 5-speed presets (1%, 25%, 50%, 75% or 100% ) via single press; long-press for infinite customization using stepless motor fan speed. And LED display shows real-time speed adjustments and remaining battery level. Extended Battery Life: Featuring a built - in 5400mAh high - capacity battery, this battery powered table top fan offers an impressive 4.5 to 20 hours of continuous use, depending on the speed setting. Attentions: For accurate battery indication and full capacity charging, ONLY use a standard 5V/2A (10W) power adapter. Charger Caution - Using high-wattage fast chargers (18W/30W+) may show false 'full charge' status, leading to shorter runtime High-power chargers overwhelm the battery's voltage regulator, causing inaccurate power readings. This is a safety feature, not a defect. Powerful Airflow with Whisper - Quiet Operation Powered by a high - speed brushless motor, our usb rechargeable fan generates wind speeds of up to 12m/s, significantly enhancing air circulation and improving indoor ventilation. But don't let its power fool you; despite its mighty airflow, this powerful air circulator fan operates at an ultra - quiet 35dB. Enjoy a peaceful and comfortable environment, making it the ideal choice for bedrooms, offices, libraries, and other noise - sensitive spaces. Enhanced Safety Design The reinforced mesh guard on the turbo fan’s rear prevents accidental contact with rotating blades. Engineered to allow full airflow while maintaining a secure barrier. Anti-slip Pads & Built-in Hook The base of this USB desk fan has 4 rubber pads to keep it from sliding around on your desk. It also has fold out hook so you can hang it inside a tent or RV to help cool you off while camping. USB Rechargeable Turbo Fan The USB charging plug is located at the bottom of the head. You can charge it or use it with any USB charger, which makes it much easier to use. To restores true battery capacity and runtime, Please use only a 5V/2A charger Versatile Usage Scenarios Home : bedroom fans for cooling and sleep, wall mounted fan for kitchen use, powerful desk top fan for living room, super practical for different setups Office : usb fan for desk, quiet fan for meeting Outdoors : travel fan for sleeping, battery operated fan for camping/RV
